name: Ward 8

spec.method_detail: Shake with ice. Double strain into chilled coupe.

history: Created in 1898 at Locke-Ober restaurant in Boston to celebrate the election victory of Martin Lomasney, the political boss of Boston's Ward 8. It's a whiskey sour with grenadine and orange juice — sweeter and more forgiving than a strict whiskey sour, and visually attractive with its pink hue. Boston's official civic cocktail.
